channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 11, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: I tested Turtle Beach's Mario-themed controller and headset for Nintendo Switch 2 — and they surprised me for 5 key reasons
item.description: I went hands-on with Turtle Beach’s Mario-themed controller and headset for Nintendo Switch 2 and they impressed me for these key reasons.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 11, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 11, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 11, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 11, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1757 on April 11 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for April 11, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Artemis 2 splashdown: See the astronauts return to Earth
item.description: Photos and videos of the splashdown of the Integrity craft in which the Artemis II crew returned to Earth

item.title: NASA Artemis II splashes down in Pacific Ocean in ‘perfect’ landing for Moon mission
item.description: The Integrity craft splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of San Diego just after 5:07 p.m. Pacific Time.
